calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:20am
Judge Pro Tem David Edward May, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Appellant, Russian Connections, appears in Pro Per through representative Natalia Ozernoy. Respondent, Rufina Shteynberg, appears in Pro Per.
Victor Plotkin, a witness for the Appellant is present; Dmitry Ivensky, a witness for the Respondent is present. Parties and witnesses, having been previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative.
12:30pm
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-25-2008 Judgment Entered
